title: chamaesyce olowaluana
intro: Chamaesyce oahuensis is the correct name but Chamaesyce olowaluana is a synonym for Chamaesyce oahuensis. Chamaesyce olowaluana, also known as Olowalu plant, is a rare succulent species of flowering plant in the spurge family (Euphorbiaceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which have been used to treat various health issues such as skin infections and wounds. Chamaesyce olowaluana can be prepared as a herbal remedy by infusing the leaves in hot water to make a tea, which is said to promote wound healing and reduce inflammation.
